prompt: Create a hyper-detailed cinematic vertical photo of a vigilant male protector with short dark hair in a deserted Times Square after a disaster, centered in the frame and crouched slightly in a defensive stance while gripping a modified black assault rifle with scope, rail attachments, foregrip, long barrel, and magazine. He wears a dark faded denim jacket with a black shearling collar over an olive shirt and black pants, with tense body language as if cautiously peering around cover. Directly behind him is one overturned yellow New York taxi lying on its roof, with two visible wheels raised upward and its side panels spanning the background. The street is empty, wet, cold, and littered with broken pavement chunks, scattered leaves, and debris. Surround the scene with tall Times Square skyscrapers, dark billboard screens, glass towers, and urban canyon perspective receding into the distance. Use a moody blue-gray dawn or overcast color grade, realistic film lighting, shallow depth of field, gritty texture, high contrast, dramatic action-thriller atmosphere, 35mm cinematic photography, ultra-realistic details, no crowds, no extra characters, no readable brand logos. Add a dark square privacy mask covering the face if privacy is desired.
